goal: Add a side-effect-free operator action runbook for BPK-070 release governance approval gates, describing next operator actions without GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, packages, or deployment.
scope_out: Do not read files, call GitHub, create PRs, merge, write files, change workflows, change package files, change deployment files, or mutate external state.
claims: Release governance operator actions can be described as a runbook without executing them.
Ready BPK-070 approval gate and runbook refs are required.
Merge and external actions remain false.
assumptions: The runbook feeds later human/operator release action only.
dod: Ready, missing runbook ref, and blocked approval gate cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Filesystem reads, GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, package changes, deployment changes, or external state mutation become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-070 placed release governance handoffs behind an operator approval gate without merge.
